positive: A central, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The style should be a blend of art nouveau elegance and modern geometric minimalism, featuring strong, clean silhouettes of intertwined trees, glowing mushrooms, and gentle forest sprites. The color palette should be deeply saturated yet harmonious, utilizing midnight blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and soft lavender gradients. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel. Use high contrast for legibility, ensuring the linework is sharp and crisp, suitable for screen printing. Include subtle celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized constellations to frame the scene.
negative: ugly, poorly drawn, blurry, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, fuzzy, grainy
